name: material_instance_get_parameters_known
description: List-only fixture for reading known scalar/vector/texture/static switch parameter arrays from a pre-staged Material Instance.

expectedContract.precondition: Create /Game/__UEvolveMcpTest/Materials/MI_ParameterSmoke with at least one scalar and one vector parameter.
expectedContract.postcheck: Returned structuredContent includes scalarParameters and vectorParameters arrays with parameter names and fromParent flags.
